---
title: "DI-2022 @ KDD 2022: Deadline Extended to June 9"
description: "Paper deadline extended to June 9, 2022. Thanks to Adobe and EY for sponsoring."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-05-27"
categories: [NLP, NLU, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

![DI-2022 @ KDD 2022 deadline extension. Image from [DI workshop](https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Updates on the 3rd Document Intelligence Workshop @ KDD2022 (DI-2022)!

* Paper deadline extended to June 9 (Thursday) 2022!
* Thank you for our sponsors Adobe and EY!

Workshop website: <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2022/>

Program Committee Chair: Ani Nenkova (Adobe).

Organizing committee: Doug Burdick (IBM Research) Benjamin Han (Microsoft), Dave Lewis (Redgrave Data) Sandeep Tata (Google) and Dan Tecuci (EY).

Previous year (DI-2021): <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2021/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_kdd2022-documentintelligence-nlp-activity-6936024442661691392-5hOz).*
